$comment: Capability taxonomy for the features.json dimension. This is DATA, not code — edit it to retarget compete to your product's market without touching any script. 'features' = product capabilities; 'services' = human/professional services. Keys are snake_case (^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$); the report humanizes them for display (override a key's label in 'labels'). Override the active taxonomy per run with `--taxonomy <path>` or the $COMPETE_TAXONOMY env var. The shipped default targets the social-media-management domain; swap the arrays below for your own axes.
name: social-media-management
